task_completion.description: Verify that the sales_data.csv data is loaded into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fields/Data pane on the right side of the Power BI window shows the loaded table with fields like Sales_Amount, Region, and Product_Category.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three required pages are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tabs at the bottom of the Power BI canvas show 'Home', 'Regional Revenue', and 'Category Breakdown'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Home page has the required navigation buttons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Home' page canvas, there are buttons with text labels 'Go to Regional Revenue' and 'Go to Category Breakdown'.

task_completion.description: Verify the content of the Regional Revenue page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Regional Revenue' page, there is a Clustered Column Chart displaying Sales_Amount by Region, and a 'Back to Home' button.

task_completion.description: Verify the content of the Category Breakdown page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Category Breakdown' page, there is a Pie or Donut Chart displaying Sales_Amount by Product_Category, and a 'Back to Home' button.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required bookmarks are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmarks pane is open and displays bookmarks named 'Revenue View' and 'Category View'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the report is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop title bar shows 'Navigation_Report' or a save dialog shows the file being saved as 'Navigation_Report.pbix' to the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Power BI Desktop application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Power BI Desktop interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the charts and buttons are genuine Power BI visuals.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visuals have standard Power BI formatting, tooltips, or selection handles when clicked, indicating they were built in the tool and not pasted as static images.

integrity.description: Verify that data was loaded from the CSV rather than manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Get Data or Power Query Editor windows show the source as the sales_data.csv file, rather than an 'Enter Data' manual table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Navigation_Report.pbix. The report must contain exactly three pages: 'Home', 'Regional Revenue', and 'Category Breakdown'. The bookmarks pane must contain 'Revenue View' and 'Category View'. There must be at least 3 buttons across the pages ('Go to Regional Revenue', 'Go to Category Breakdown', and 'Back to Home').
